name: Radeem
bio: Pragmatic, blunt, and fiercely independent, Radeem has little patience for politics or peace. He is not cruel, but he finds purpose only in struggle. War is the natural state of things, he believes — it reveals truth, exposes weakness, and forges strength. Though he once served Valdre loyally, he grew tired of the elder god’s obsession with control and harmony.

Born from the first clash of titans, Radeem rose quickly through the divine ranks. He forged peace through dominance, won worship through victory, and mentored many younger gods in battle. But over time, the lack of conflict dulled him. With no worthy wars left to fight, he began provoking them — subtly at first, then more openly.
